title: Mutate Board Views API
excerpt: It would be really useful to provide a board views mutation API so that we can create board views programmatically.  Our use case requires frequent addition of new customers to our workflow, and the manual update of boar…

posts.author: Steve_Merchant (Steve Merchant)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really useful to provide a board views mutation API so that we can create board views programmatically. Our use case requires frequent addition of new customers to our workflow, and the manual update of board views to support this is a labour intensive, error prone, inefficient and onerous task.

Thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Steve_Merchant,

We have an open request for this. I have added your vote

If this gets implemented, you will see it in our changelog

Cheers,
Matias
